posts.text: No mortgage. No rent. No split. I made the dream smaller until it stopped charging fees. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
drafts: No mortgage. No rent. No split. I made the dream smaller until it stopped charging fees. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

Tiny house. Big land. Full bars. Still not answering everybody. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

drafts: Tiny house. Big land. Full bars. Still not answering everybody. No Mortgage is live.
The dream got very small and somehow more honest. No Mortgage is up now.
I removed the expensive parts of the dream and kept the signal. No Mortgage is live.

posts.text: No Mortgage is not a lifestyle mood board. It is the practical fantasy of fewer bills, fewer hooks, and enough distance to hear yourself think. Tiny house, big land, full bars, ramen once a week. Glamorous? No. Useful? Extremely. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
drafts: No Mortgage is not a lifestyle mood board. It is the practical fantasy of fewer bills, fewer hooks, and enough distance to hear yourself think. Tiny house, big land, full bars, ramen once a week. Glamorous? No. Useful? Extremely. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
I like a dream that can show its math. No mortgage. No rent. No split. Just land, signal, ramen, and fewer people explaining why the expensive trap is respectable. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
No Mortgage is what happens when the fantasy stops being bigger and starts being cheaper. Less impressive. More survivable. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

posts.text: No mortgage. That is the whole luxury package.

Tiny house, big land, one ramen run, zero respectable traps.
Full bars. Still mute. Honestly, growth.

No Mortgage is not anti-dream. It is anti-monthly-payment-as-personality.

posts.imagery: No Mortgage thumbnail + freedom by subtraction
posts.text: No Mortgage is a song about freedom by subtraction. Not more house, more stuff, more proof. Less bill, less noise, less explaining. It is not polished. That is kind of the point. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
drafts: No Mortgage is a song about freedom by subtraction. Not more house, more stuff, more proof. Less bill, less noise, less explaining. It is not polished. That is kind of the point. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
There is a version of independence that looks suspiciously like a tiny house, a weak grocery plan, and ignoring everyone with perfect reception. No Mortgage is live. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

posts.text: The smallest dream with the fewest invoices is still a dream. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4
drafts: The smallest dream with the fewest invoices is still a dream. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

Tiny house. Big land. Low cost. Still high. https://youtu.be/9rmy2JhBuF4

posts.text: I turned 13 and did not become new. I just ordered rigatoni out loud and survived the attention. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
drafts: I turned 13 and did not become new. I just ordered rigatoni out loud and survived the attention. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
Still weird. Still me. Less scared to be seen. 13 is up now. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
One aisle over is not a heroic distance. Apparently it counts anyway. 13 is up now. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0

posts.text: Still weird. Still me. Less scared to be seen.
drafts: Still weird. Still me. Less scared to be seen.
I order. I answer. I leave. I come back. Still me. Less hidden.
Thirteen did not make me brave. It made me just enough.

posts.text: 13 is not a song where I wake up magically different. It is smaller and more annoying than that. I order for myself. I go one aisle over. I raise my hand before the room fully collapses into waiting. Still weird. Still me. A little less hidden. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
drafts: 13 is not a song where I wake up magically different. It is smaller and more annoying than that. I order for myself. I go one aisle over. I raise my hand before the room fully collapses into waiting. Still weird. Still me. A little less hidden. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0

Turning 13 did not make me louder. It just made a few tiny things possible: rigatoni ordered out loud, one aisle over, one hand raised in class. That is the whole jump. Small, but mine. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
Nobody else knows when a small thing is actually a mountain with better lighting. 13 is mine: ordering, answering, leaving, coming back. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
posts.reply_text: More from the Analog Myth album: https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0

posts.text: One aisle over. Beating heart. Nobody noticed. Rude of them. Also good. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0

No one knows. I do. That is the part. 13 is up now. https://youtu.be/IahKaEXEA_0
